case_title: MUKUTA MUANZA VS. WALDEN HOUSE, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-16-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALDEN HOUSE, INC.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUANZA, MUKUTA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WALDEN HOUSE, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MUANZA, MUKUTA AS TO DEFENDANT WALDEN HOUSE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2011 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-26-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUANZA, MUKUTA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WALDEN HOUSE, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
